requirement: EEE must not contain lead, mercury, cadmium, Cr6+, DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP above maximum concentration values.
gap: Product contains lead and DEHP above RoHS threshold — homogeneous-material test certificates are missing.
recommended_action: Commission independent lab testing per IEC 62321, update DoC, replace restricted substances or obtain formal exemption.

requirement: Single-use plastic packaging must be minimised. Plastic film over-wrapping of grouped products is restricted.
gap: Product uses plastic film packaging targeted for restriction under PPWR.
recommended_action: Switch to recyclable or paper-based packaging. Document changes and update environmental declaration.

requirement: All portable electronic devices sold in the EU must use USB-C as the common charging port from Dec 2024.
gap: Charging port is not USB-C — product uses proprietary connector, non-compliant from Dec 2024.
recommended_action: Redesign product to use USB-C port compliant with USB PD standard. Update technical file and Declaration of Conformity.

regulation: Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation (EU) 2024/1781 – ESPR
requirement: Power supplies must meet minimum energy efficiency thresholds and carry Digital Product Passport (DPP) from 2026.
gap: No Digital Product Passport (DPP) established for this product — required under ESPR from 2026.
recommended_action: Register product in EU DPP registry, declare material composition, energy class, and repairability score.

requirement: Industrial batteries with capacity > 2 kWh must carry a digital battery passport before EU market placement.
gap: Industrial battery (>2 kWh) placed on EU market without a digital battery passport.
recommended_action: Set up battery passport (data record + QR code) linked to each battery unit before the Feb 2027 deadline.

regulation: EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 – Carbon Footprint Declaration
requirement: Rechargeable industrial and EV batteries must carry a carbon footprint declaration per kWh from Feb 2025.
gap: No carbon footprint declaration per kWh exists for this rechargeable battery product.
recommended_action: Calculate lifecycle carbon footprint per kWh using EN ISO 14067, register on EU Battery Passport registry, attach QR code.

requirement: Single-use plastic packaging must be minimised. Plastic film over-wrapping is restricted.
gap: Product uses plastic film packaging targeted for restriction under PPWR.
recommended_action: Switch to recyclable or paper-based packaging. Document changes and update environmental declaration.

requirement: Portable batteries incorporated in appliances must be removable and replaceable without specialist tools by Feb 2027.
gap: Battery embedded in device is not independently removable by end-user.
recommended_action: Redesign product so the portable battery can be removed without specialist tools. Update technical file and DoC before Feb 2027.

regulation: Radio Equipment Directive (EU) 2014/53 – RED Art. 3(3) Cybersecurity
requirement: Internet-connected radio devices must comply with RED Art. 3(3)(d)(e)(f) cybersecurity requirements from Aug 2025.
gap: Bluetooth speaker with wireless connectivity has no documented RED Art. 3(3) cybersecurity conformity assessment.
recommended_action: Conduct RED Art. 3(3)(d)(e)(f) conformity assessment, apply EN 18031 harmonised standard, update technical file and DoC.

requirement: Portable batteries incorporated in appliances must be removable and replaceable without specialist tools by Feb 2027.
gap: Battery embedded in device is not independently removable by end-user.
recommended_action: Redesign product so the portable battery can be removed without specialist tools. Update technical file and DoC.

regulation: General Product Safety Regulation (EU) 2023/988 – GPSR Traceability
requirement: Economic operators must ensure traceability, maintain technical documentation, and register on the EU Safety Gate portal.
gap: Product not registered on EU Safety Gate portal — GPSR traceability and economic-operator obligations unmet.
recommended_action: Register on EU Safety Gate Business portal, maintain up-to-date technical documentation and recall procedures.

requirement: Portable batteries incorporated in appliances must be removable and replaceable without specialist tools by Feb 2027.
gap: Battery embedded in device is not independently removable by end-user.
recommended_action: Redesign product so the portable battery can be removed without specialist tools. Update technical file and DoC.

requirement: Articles containing SVHC above 0.1% w/w must be notified to ECHA SCIP database and disclosed to customers on request.
gap: Product contains SVHC substance PFAS_PFHxA above 0.1% w/w — SCIP notification to ECHA is missing.
recommended_action: Submit SCIP notification to ECHA for each article containing SVHC. Update safety data sheets and customer disclosure.

regulation: EU Medical Device Regulation (EU) 2017/745 – MDR Classification
requirement: Body-worn devices with medical intended purpose must be classified and certified under MDR within the transition period.
gap: Body-worn device with medical intended purpose has no MDR conformity assessment — CE mark under old MDD may be expired.
recommended_action: Engage a Notified Body for MDR conformity assessment. Prepare clinical evaluation, technical file, and UDI registration.

requirement: Portable batteries incorporated in appliances must be removable and replaceable without specialist tools by Feb 2027.
gap: Battery embedded in medical device is not independently removable by end-user.
recommended_action: Evaluate battery removability feasibility under MDR constraints. If not feasible, apply for formal exemption under Art. 11(6).

requirement: Portable batteries incorporated in appliances must be removable and replaceable without specialist tools by Feb 2027.
gap: Battery embedded in device is not independently removable by end-user.
recommended_action: Redesign product so the portable battery can be removed without specialist tools. Update technical file and DoC.

requirement: Toys and electronic products must not contain DEHP above 0.1% w/w in any homogeneous material.
gap: Toy contains DEHP above RoHS threshold — re-test against tighter limits required.
recommended_action: Commission IEC 62321-8 lab test for DEHP, replace plasticiser with compliant alternative (e.g. DINP), update DoC.

requirement: Single-use plastic packaging must be minimised. Plastic film over-wrapping is restricted.
gap: Product uses plastic film packaging targeted for restriction under PPWR.
recommended_action: Switch to recyclable or paper-based packaging. Document changes and update environmental declaration.

requirement: Cables must not contain DEHP, MCCP, or lead above maximum concentration values in any homogeneous material.
gap: Cable contains DEHP, MCCP, and lead — homogeneous-material test certificates missing.
recommended_action: Commission IEC 62321 lab testing for all three substances. Replace or apply for formal exemption. Update DoC.

requirement: Single-use plastic packaging must be minimised. Plastic film over-wrapping is restricted.
gap: Product uses plastic film packaging targeted for restriction under PPWR.
recommended_action: Switch to recyclable or paper-based packaging. Document changes and update environmental declaration.

requirement: Displays must not contain mercury above 0.1% w/w in any homogeneous material.
gap: Display product contains mercury — homogeneous-material test documentation missing.
recommended_action: Commission IEC 62321-4 mercury test. Transition to mercury-free LED backlighting. Update Declaration of Conformity.

regulation: Energy Labelling Regulation (EU) 2017/1369 – Rescaled Energy Label
requirement: Displays must carry the rescaled A-G energy label from March 2021 and comply with updated Ecodesign lot requirements.
gap: Display product has no valid rescaled A-G energy label — old label format may still be applied.
recommended_action: Re-test display against rescaled energy label requirements, register on EU EPREL database, affix new A-G label to product and packaging.

requirement: Articles containing SVHC above 0.1% w/w must be notified to ECHA SCIP database.
gap: Product contains SVHC substances TBBPA and decaBDE above 0.1% w/w — SCIP notification to ECHA is missing.
recommended_action: Submit SCIP notification to ECHA for each article. Update safety data sheets and customer disclosure documentation.

regulation: Cyber Resilience Act (EU) 2024/2847 – CRA Software Security
requirement: Connected products with digital elements must meet CRA software security requirements including vulnerability reporting from Dec 2027.
gap: IoT device has no documented vulnerability disclosure policy or software update mechanism required under CRA.
recommended_action: Establish a PSIRT process, implement automatic security update mechanism, document software bill of materials (SBOM).

requirement: EEE must not contain cadmium above 0.01% w/w in any homogeneous material.
gap: PV inverter product contains cadmium above RoHS threshold — homogeneous-material test documentation missing.
recommended_action: Commission IEC 62321-5 cadmium test. Replace cadmium-containing components or obtain formal RoHS exemption. Update DoC.

regulation: General Product Safety Regulation (EU) 2023/988 – GPSR Traceability
requirement: Economic operators must ensure traceability and register products on the EU Safety Gate portal.
gap: Product not registered on EU Safety Gate portal — GPSR traceability obligations unmet.
recommended_action: Register on EU Safety Gate Business portal, maintain technical documentation and recall procedures.

requirement: Light-means-of-transport (LMT) batteries must carry a digital battery passport (QR code) before EU market placement.
gap: LMT battery placed on EU market without a digital battery passport / QR data carrier.
recommended_action: Create the battery passport (QR code + data record) and attach to battery before deadline.
